name: kixa
description: Full stack e-commerce website. I started this project after learning HTML, CSS and JavaScript basics. My goal was to learn real-world development practices. Due throwing myself into a challenging but achievable project with limited web-development knowledge, I had to often rewrite and rethink major parts of the application. I'm not finished yet, but I've already made huge progress compared the first version of the website.

scripts.dev: concurrently "nodemon backend/index.js" "npm run dev --prefix react-frontend" "stripe login" "stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhook/stripe"
